mapper.select: SELECT id, patient_id, doctor_id, registration_date, time_slot, visit_type, status FROM registration
SELECT id, patient_id, doctor_id, registration_date, time_slot, visit_type, status FROM registration WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY registration_date DESC
SELECT id, patient_id, doctor_id, registration_date, time_slot, visit_type, status FROM registration WHERE doctor_id = #{doctorId} ORDER BY registration_date DESC, time_slot
SELECT * FROM v_patient_outpatient_history WHERE patient_no = (SELECT patient_no FROM patient WHERE id = #{patientId})

SELECT p.id AS patient_id, p.patient_no, p.name AS patient_name, COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) AS registration_count, COUNT(DISTINCT ov.id) AS visit_count, COUNT(DISTINCT h.id) AS hospitalization_count, COALESCE(SUM(ov.consultation_fee), 0) AS total_consultation_fee, COALESCE(SUM(pr.total_drug_price), 0) AS total_drug_fee, COALESCE(SUM(ov.consultation_fee), 0) + COALESCE(SUM(pr.total_drug_price), 0) AS total_cost FROM patient p LEFT JOIN registration r ON r.patient_id = p.id LEFT JOIN outpatient_visit ov ON ov.registration_id = r.id LEFT JOIN prescription pr ON pr.visit_id = ov.id LEFT JOIN hospitalization h ON h.patient_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.patient_no, p.name HAVING registration_count > 0 OR hospitalization_count > 0 ORDER BY total_cost DESC

SELECT ov.visit_time, ov.diagnosis, ov.symptoms, ov.consultation_fee, doc.name AS doctor_name, doc.title AS doctor_title, pr.total_drug_price, (COALESCE(ov.consultation_fee, 0) + COALESCE(pr.total_drug_price, 0)) AS total_cost FROM outpatient_visit ov JOIN doctor doc ON ov.doctor_id = doc.id LEFT JOIN prescription pr ON pr.visit_id = ov.id WHERE ov.patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY ov.visit_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO registration (patient_id, doctor_id, registration_date, time_slot, visit_type, status) VALUES (#{patientId}, #{doctorId}, #{registrationDate}, #{timeSlot}, #{visitType}, #{status})
